## v0.3.0

### Highlights
- Added config file support (`log-sherpa.config.ts|js|json`).
- Added CI policy exit codes with threshold and regex gates.
- Added PII scrubber plugin.
- Added Markdown, HTML, and SARIF output formats.
- Added compare mode (`--compare old.log new.log`).
- Added fingerprint grouping and top fingerprint summaries.
- Added watch mode (`--tail`, `--tail-interval`).
- Added Laravel context enrichment (route/controller/job/request id extraction).
- Added shell completions and improved CLI error behavior.
- Added baseline create/check commands for regression detection.
- Added built-in pattern packs (`database`, `auth`, `queue`, `cache`).
- Added OpenTelemetry and Sentry export bridge outputs.
- Added fixture pack (`test/fixtures/common-laravel-errors.log`).

### Quality
- Expanded test suite to cover new modules and CLI behavior.
- All tests and type checks pass.
